## Checklist

- [ ] All new user-visible strings are in `res/values/strings.xml` (no hardcoded literals)
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated for changed logic
- [ ] `./gradlew testDebugUnitTest lint` passes locally
- [ ] No new lint warnings introduced
- [ ] Accessibility: new UI elements have `contentDescription` where appropriate
- [ ] RTL layout checked (enable "Force RTL" in Developer Options)
- [ ] If this changes server behaviour: tested with at least one FTP client (e.g. FileZilla)
